title: onosma discedens
intro: Onosma discedens, also known as the Himalayan onosma or Himalayan goldensal, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Onosma discedens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
